sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented for this dungeon crawler RPG

special_mechanics.name: First-Person Dungeon Navigation
special_mechanics.description: Tile-based cardinal direction movement through labyrinthine dungeons with limited field of view showing only what is immediately before characters

special_mechanics.name: Turn-Based Combat System
special_mechanics.description: Turn-based RPG battle system with no platforming or real-time movement physics

special_mechanics.name: Elemental Spirit System
special_mechanics.description: Four rotating elemental spirits (Sylph, Efrite, Dao, Marid) with separate health states, can be rotated out when incapacitated

tier_notes: Tier 3 qualitative data. Arcana is a first-person dungeon-crawling RPG without platforming mechanics. Movement is tile-based and turn-based in nature. No physics-based movement parameters (gravity, jump, velocity) are applicable to this game's core mechanics. Game focuses on turn-based combat and exploration rather than action platforming.
